api_cases.title: Happy path three-person trip with HITL city choice
api_cases.purpose: Exercises parse_input, preference constraints, destination selection, HITL resume, dynamic tools, data fetch, budget, hotel, itinerary, fairness, and output assembly.

payload.group_notes: Keep the trip relaxed, avoid rushed mornings, and make sure the plan respects everyone's must-haves.

members.name: Alice
members.preference_notes: Hates early mornings, no clubs, wants Italian food at least once.

members.name: Bob
members.preference_notes: Likes relaxed days with good meals and urban neighborhoods, but does not want an overpacked schedule.

members.name: Carol
members.preference_notes: Interested in scenic walks and museums, but not late-night clubbing.

expected: SSE emits NODE_PROGRESS for parse_input and select_destination
SSE pauses at HITL_REQUIRED with 5 candidate destinations
TRIP_COMPLETE contains trip_pitch, days, hotel, flights, fairness_passed, decision_log
Each day includes rationale and constraint_notes explaining itinerary decisions
Constraint satisfaction should mention no clubs, relaxed pace, late mornings, and Italian meal requirement

api_cases.title: Tight budget should trigger budget analysis pressure
api_cases.purpose: Checks budget_status routing and severe/moderate behavior without changing the graph wiring.

payload.group_notes: Cheapest realistic weekend possible. Avoid expensive hotels.

members.name: Sam
members.preference_notes: Okay with simple food and free outdoor activities.

expected: If status is severe, destination retry count increments and select_destination may run again
If accepted, output should clearly flag estimated or constrained budget choices

api_cases.title: Vegan and gluten-free meal validation
api_cases.purpose: Exercises deterministic meal validation and LLM instruction following.

payload.group_notes: Food restrictions are mandatory. Prefer scenic neighborhoods and calm evenings.

members.name: Nina
members.preference_notes: No dairy, no eggs, no wheat. Wants relaxed mornings.

members.name: Omar
members.preference_notes: Museums and scenic walks, no bars.

expected: No meal contains meat, pork, bacon, ham, dairy, milk, egg, pasta, bread, flour, or wheat
validation_gate returns no food restriction errors
constraint_satisfaction.passed is true or clearly lists unmet restrictions

api_cases.title: High nightlife score but explicit no clubs
api_cases.purpose: Proves natural-language hard constraints override preference vector scores.

payload.group_notes: No clubs, no nightclubs, no bar hopping. Keep evenings quiet.

members.name: Ivy
members.preference_notes: Normally likes nightlife but this trip should have no clubs.

expected: Day rationale explains why quiet evening activities were chosen
final itinerary contains no nightclub or club activity

deterministic_cases.expected: Fallback extractor still captures no clubs, relaxed pace, late mornings, and Italian cuisine.
food is included and nightlife is excluded even when nightlife score is high.
Club activity is removed, museum remains.
Nightclub, missing Italian meal, and too-early schedule are reported.
Satisfied constraints pass with an empty validation_errors list.
Graph builds, expected nodes are present, and compiled orchestrator initializes.
Live-gated end-to-end run reaches HITL, resumes with Command(resume=...), completes, and writes artifacts.
